top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sets s
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.code IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT f.language
    FROM foreign_data f
    WHERE f.language = 'Japanese'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sets s
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.code IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT f.language
    FROM foreign_data f
    WHERE f.language = 'Japanese'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sets s
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM set_translations st
    WHERE st.setCode = s.code
      AND st.language = 'Japanese'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sets s
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.code IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT f.language
    FROM foreign_data f
    WHERE f.language = 'Japanese'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sets s
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM set_translations st
    WHERE st.setCode = s.code
      AND st.language = 'Japanese'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND st.language = 'Japanese';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sets s
WHERE s.isForeignOnly = 1
  AND s.isOnlineOnly = 0
  AND s.code IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT f.language
    FROM foreign_data f
    WHERE f.language = 'Japanese'
  );
